entries.attempted: Bend via Punktverschiebung (Joint Rotation, Ghost Sphere, Translation)
entries.outcome: Alle drei Modi erzeugten Verschiebung/Kompression statt Kruemmung — Bump-Achse blieb fix
Funktioniert korrekt — starre Neigung des gesamten Bumps

entries.attempted: Lever shader formula confirmed: pos = dir*rmin + sum(rotate_axis_angle(dir*amplitude*f, lean_axis, lean_amount + bend_amount*f))
entries.outcome: This is cs_main in COMPUTE_SHADER. eval_pos_cpu mirrors it exactly.
entries.decided: Authoritative surface formula. Do not switch to ghost sphere eval_r for rendering.

entries.outcome: Collision proxy only. Confirmed matching lever surface geometry.
entries.decided: Keep for collision. Not used for rendering.

entries.attempted: max_bend recalibration — existing constraint used ghost sphere radial formula, wrong for lever shader
entries.outcome: Not yet implemented. 2D cross-section formula derived. pos_and_deriv needs replacing.
entries.decided: First task next session. See decisions for constraint model.

2026-05-20.decision: Lean and Bend are separate mechanisms
2026-05-20.rationale: Lean tilts the whole bump rigidly; Bend curves via lever rotation. Clean separation allows independent control.

2026-05-29.decision: max_lean and max_bend computed independently, coupled at UI time only
2026-05-29.rationale: Independent limits are cheap and predictable. Joint 2D bisection over (lean,bend) not worth the complexity.

2026-05-29.decision: max_bend_effective = max_bend * (1 - lean_fraction * 0.5), lean_fraction = lean_amount / max_lean
2026-05-29.rationale: Shared soft budget: bend headroom halved at max lean. Applied in main.rs slider logic, not in constraint computation.
No analytical fold condition needed for lean alone at current amplitudes. Revisit if ALife evolves extreme shapes.

resume_point: Implement max_bend for lever shader: replace pos_and_deriv inner formula with lever surface. 2D cross-section: px = sin(t)*rmin - a*f*sin(lean+bend*f), py = cos(t)*rmin + a*f*cos(lean+bend*f). Same bisection structure, evaluate at lean_amount=0 worst case. Then: blob-blob collision ring.
open_questions: max_bend bisection: verify new lever pos_and_deriv fires before visible fold — test at high concentration + amplitude
blob-blob collision: overlap test only, or penetration depth + contact normal?
conserve_volume with strongly bent bumps is approximate — sufficient for ALife fitness?
